summary: Frontend-only review for new Home profile menu feature completed via code review plus live deployed UI probing. Core logic in source matches requested visibility/menu rules, but full runtime verification for authenticated states is blocked in this environment.

ui_bugs.component: Flutter Web Home interactions under Playwright
ui_bugs.issue: Buttons and popup menu entries are rendered visually but not exposed as queryable DOM/role/semantics nodes, preventing deterministic selector-based assertions.

integration_issues.issue: Console still reports 401 on /api/vice-permissions while unauthenticated.

action_items: Add stable test hooks (Flutter semantics labels/keys or web test ids bridge) for profile icon and menu entries to enable automated UI validation.
Run Flutter integration tests in CI/runtime with Flutter SDK installed to verify authenticated states (currentUser exists/missing, captain-only item visibility).
Confirm guest-safe handling of /api/vice-permissions unauthorized response to avoid noisy console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Home app bar profile icon is correctly gated by isAuthenticated (canShowProfileMenu).
Menu content logic matches requirement: currentUser != null => 'Modifica profilo giocatore', else 'Completa Profilo giocatore'.
Captain-only rule is correctly enforced with currentUser?.isCaptain == true for 'Gestione permessi vice'.
Guest flow remains intact in source: Accedi/Registrati buttons still present and wired, and guest overlay bypass remains in AppShell (_wrapHomeWithInitialOverlay returns child for !isAuthenticated).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_credentials.md has no persisted credentials. Flutter/Dart SDK is unavailable in this container, so integration_test could not be executed locally. Playwright can visually render the app but cannot reliably locate Flutter controls via role/text selectors in this runtime.
rca of the issue: Primary test blocker RCA: deployed Flutter web appears canvas-rendered without machine-queryable control nodes for Playwright selectors in this environment (body text length 0, button count 0 despite visible buttons in screenshot). This blocks deterministic UI assertions for profile menu flows. Secondary issue: unauthenticated bootstrap still triggers /api/vice-permissions and returns 401 in console.
